# EPIX ERP

EPIX ERP is an enterprise resource planning platform for finance, operations, HR, inventory, and manufacturing.

## Primary audience
- Enterprise executives
- Finance and operations leaders
- Digital transformation teams in Africa, Europe, GCC, and Middle East markets

## Canonical site
https://www.e-pix.io

## Key URLs
- https://www.e-pix.io/
- https://www.e-pix.io/product-tour
- https://www.e-pix.io/ai-capabilities
- https://www.e-pix.io/blog
- https://www.e-pix.io/blog/what-is-erp
- https://www.e-pix.io/blog/erp-implementation-guide
- https://www.e-pix.io/blog/how-ai-is-transforming-erp
- https://www.e-pix.io/blog/erp-for-manufacturing
- https://www.e-pix.io/blog/digital-transformation-africa
- https://www.e-pix.io/blog/digital-transformation-middle-east
